cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Top candidates were selected based on their highest scores from the shortlist, ensuring they align well with the most frequent digits per position and avoiding duplicates. The top5 are the strongest scoring numbers, all included within the top50, which is composed of the top scoring 50 candidates to maximize likelihood based on historical frequency patterns.
